rationale: Section 18 governs equalization of valuations, single countywide appraisal, and boards of equalization. It does not address or limit homestead exemption amounts. Increasing the §11.13(b) exemption does not affect appraisal equalization or single-appraisal requirements.
quote: The Legislature shall provide for equalizing, as near as may be, the valuation of all property subject to or rendered for taxation
_note: No conflict. Homestead exemption authority derives from Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b, not §18.
